name: Tofu Chop Suey
recipeInstructions:
1. Freshly ground pepper and salt.
2. Tofu provides the protein, similar to chicken breasts, in this quick-to-prepare colorful vegetarian main dish.
3. Drain tofu and cut into 3/4-inch pieces. Place between layers of paper towels and weigh down with a dinner plate. Let stand for 10 minutes to compress and remove excess water.
4. Heat oil in a frying pan. Add 2 tablespoons broth and ginger, cooking until lightly fragrant. Add celery, onion, and red pepper; stir-cook over medium heat for 3 minutes.
5. Add bean sprouts and continue stir-cooking for an additional minute.
6. Stir in the remaining broth, soy sauce, and tofu. Cook and gently stir over medium heat until vegetables are tender-crisp and liquid has evaporated. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Serving size: 1 3/4 cups - 194 calories, 13 grams carbohydrate, 13 grams protein, 10 grams fat
